title: Autopopulate column with item update email address
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am looking for a way to autopopulate an email column with the unique item update email address.  Ideally, this would be done when a new item is created but I can also tie to to another automation via status change…

posts.author: Traia (Thomas Raia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to autopopulate an email column with the unique item update email address. Ideally, this would be done when a new item is created but I can also tie to to another automation via status change. Any suggestions?

Thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Thomas,

I am afraid this type of automation isn’t supported natively. I encourage you to post this in our developers community to see whether this is something that can be achieved through our API or a third party tool
